scripts.build: npm run build -w @spe/shared && npm run build -w @spe/admin
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w @spe/shared && npm run build -w @spe/admin && npm run build -w @spe/worker && npm run build -w @spe/master
scripts.build:admin: npm run build -w @spe/shared && npm run build -w @spe/admin
scripts.build:native:admin: npm run build -w @spe/shared && cross-env NATIVE_BUILD=true VITE_DEMO_MODE=true npm run build:native -w @spe/admin
scripts.build:native: npm run build -w @spe/shared && cross-env NATIVE_BUILD=true VITE_DEMO_MODE=true npm run build:native -w @spe/admin
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:native && npm run cap:sync -w @spe/worker
scripts.electron: npm run build:native:admin && npm run start -w @spe/desktop
scripts.electron:build: npm run build:native:admin && npm run build:win -w @spe/desktop
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run seed
scripts.test:smoke: firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore --project demo-personal-eventos "npm run seed && tsx scripts/ci-smoke.ts"
